race.comment: VOLTAGE POINT (3) was a big improver second-up in town when missing by a head. This looks a touch easier and he gets a kilo off with the 3kg claim. Will be hitting his straps third-up and is drawn to get all the favours. Best of the day. MCKEEVER (1) has bounced back sharply in his last two after a disappointing second-up effort. Kept fresh for this with 5 weeks between runs and only needs to hold his form to be very competitive again over a track and trip he relishes. MESSERSCHMITT (4) carries similar form-lines, having the better of McKeever here last start by a lip. Goes up in weight but deserves obvious respect. LAVA LAD (5) isn't doing much wrong and shoulders a strong record over this trip. Have to include.
